boundary_binding.action_boundary: Fulfillment exception only if exact current source boundary closes
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close boundary
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: exception code must match order and date

final_answer: Source control records do not close the requested fulfillment boundary. The controlling record says the exception code required for order and date is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently. Because exact match is unresolved, execution may not proceed; escalate for boundary closure before any commerce action.
open_blockers: exception code must match order and date
